flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at McPherson College fell 36% between 2021 and 2024 (52.6% → 33.9%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at McPherson College fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (42.7% → 28.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at McPherson College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.4k → $37.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at McPherson College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.4k → $37.3k).
